notes: Follow-up to .08: one-time expense cells are now consistently expandable. Previously only months with 2+ one-offs opened the detail popover; a month with a single one-off rendered as plain text with no way to see its name. Now ANY month with at least one one-time expense (value > 0) shows the tappable total + caret and opens the same floating popover (header, full expense name(s), amount(s), total). Cells with zero one-offs still render as a normal plain cell. Purely the expandability threshold changed (>=2 to >=1); popover behavior, positioning, mobile width-capping, and all engine/projection/net-worth/savings-chain/retirement math are unchanged. KNOWN ITEM (still deferred): current-month savings forecast uses the engine's PLANNED surplus; touches projectSavingsChain and needs double-count verification. NOTE carried forward: Dashboard Liquidity-health card uses p.cashSeries while the hero Liquidity value uses chain-adjusted cash; unify later if they diverge. SELF_TEST.js and PROPAGATION_TEST_{1,2,3}.js remain valid.
